chunks.text: Ekta Singh-Bushell appointed to board of Datatec - EECS at Berkeley Alumna Ekta Singh-Bushell (M.S. ’95), the former Chief Operating Officer of the Federal Reserve Bank of New York, has been appointed to the board of directors for Datatec, South Africa’s biggest Johannesburg Stock Exchange-listed tech firm. Singh-Bushell will also be a member of Datatec’s audit, risk & compliance committee and on its social & ethics committee. She previously worked at a senior level for EY (formerly Ersnt & Young) for 17 years, including as US innovation & digital strategy leader, Northeast Advisory people leader and chief information security officer. Categories Alumni Industry View Open Faculty Positions
